target: 7. Yashikawa Line
Shinpei Ajiro
(After eating, I suddenly felt exhausted…)

(I want to sleep right away…
But I can't skip the bath…)
(Phone… from the window?)
Hello?

Shinpei?
Is it okay to talk now?
Ah, it's okay.
About that conversation we left hanging earlier…
Ah… about Ushio's body being dissected?
That was just a rumor with a tail fin.

Huh?
Really?

Ah… they didn't even perform an autopsy.
It was just my father attending the police's postmortem.
So if that's the case--
But…

They found the <color=#GF_TIPS_064>Yashikawa Line</color> in the postmortem…
Around Ushio's neck…
Yashikawa Line…?

Yes…
It was a strangulation mark…!!!
Eh…?

So… even though Ushio died,
It wasn't just an accident…
There's a possibility of murder!!!

!!! …What?
A murderer… That's impossible…!!!

So there's someone who would kill Ushio?!
And you were with her, right?!
What the hell is going on?!

Ah… we were definitely together.
But… no one saw anything.

That day… we were playing on the beach behind the school
Where tourists didn't go.

It was me and Tokiko.
Ushio, Mio, Shiori, and two of her friends…
That's seven people total.

Ushio noticed Shiori was drowning first and went to help her
With a life ring…

Me and Mio jumped in right away,
But there was no suspicious person around…

What the hell is that?!
I don't get it!!!

Ah…
Even when I talked to Shiori, she was in that condition…
…Do everyone know about the Yashikawa Line?
Impossible!!!

Only Mio, Alain, the police officer…
And my father know.
But from the circumstances, they concluded it was an accident.
…What about the police?
They're treating it as an accident.
I see…
Shin-chan, can I talk to you for a moment?
Ah, wait a second.
Mio?

Ah…
Sorry, I need to go soon today.

Understood. I'll contact you again.
…Stay by Mio's side today.

Yeah… understood.
Thanks.

Sorry.
You can open it.
Shin-chan…
What's wrong?

Hey… this.
The <color=#GF_KEY_USI_NECKLACE>necklace</color> my sister was wearing last.
I think you should have it…
Ushio… had this?

Yeah. It was in the pool bag.
My sister's belongings…

She always wore it.
Whether she was going out or at home,
She treated it like something precious…

She even had it with her that day…
But… in the end… just the end…
Hey, Shin-chan…

My sister…!!!
I can't… ever again…!!!
I'll never see her…!!!
I don't want to… I don't want to…!!!
…Yeah.
…I can't forgive…!
The person who killed my sister…!!!

…Oh… hey, Mio…
You know something, don't you?!!!

CHIIIIIN!!!
ZUBIBIBI!!!

Oh… oh no…!!!
You damn it!
Don't sniff someone else's clothes!!!

Hehe… sorry.
It's nothing.

If you stay wet all the time,
Your sister will get angry.
You need to stop crying today!!!

Bye, Shin-chan!
Ah, the bath is free, so you can take it!
Ah… yeah.
…Ushio had this pendant…
It's beautiful…

Thank you, Shinpei!
I'll take care of it!!!

(That seashell I gave…
It's so ordinary, nothing special…
But…)
That guy… still has this…
…Ugh, ugh…
